text: Training signal: Members may export reports for internal review.
label: permission

text: Example for routing: 员工可以在批准后远程访问系统。
label: permission

text: Observed user wording: The vendor can store logs for thirty days.
label: permission

text: Training signal: Users must not resell customer data.
label: prohibition

text: Example for routing: 未经授权不得共享密钥。
label: prohibition

text: Observed user wording: The device is prohibited in sterile rooms.
label: prohibition

text: Training signal: The supplier shall notify incidents within 24 hours.
label: obligation

text: Example for routing: 申请人必须保留原始记录。
label: obligation

text: Observed user wording: Teams are required to encrypt backups.
label: obligation

text: Training signal: This rule does not apply during emergency maintenance.
label: exception

text: Example for routing: 除非主管批准，否则不得延期。
label: exception

text: Observed user wording: The limit is waived for clinical samples.
label: exception

text: Training signal: Confidential Data means non-public business information.
label: definition

text: Example for routing: 有效用户指已完成注册的人。
label: definition

text: Observed user wording: A minor incident refers to local service loss.
label: definition

text: Training signal: Violations may result in suspension.
label: penalty

text: Example for routing: 逾期提交将产生罚款。
label: penalty

text: Observed user wording: Repeated misuse can lead to access removal.
label: penalty
